scenario_description: Sequential 4-step workflow: rename sheet, add computed column, filter and copy, add summary.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Rename the first sheet from 'Sheet1' to 'Income Data'.
Add a column called 'Margin' that calculates Revenue minus Expenses for each row.
Create a new sheet called 'High Margin'. Copy all rows where Margin is positive to this new sheet.
In the 'High Margin' sheet, add a Total row at the bottom summing the Margin column. Save the file.

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl=pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/NetIncome.xlsx'); names=xl.sheet_names; has_income='Income Data' in names; has_hm='High Margin' in names; print('PASSED' if has_income and has_hm else 'FAILED')"
